title: Compress context injection from 45-82K to 20-25K tokens per turn
summary: Reduce intraday notes from 12 entries × 250 chars to 6 entries × 100 chars, compress TOOL_BLOCKS by 60% via lean checklists, and inject toolsBlock only when categories are actually activated. Target: 50% token savings per turn.

affectedFiles.description: Compress intraday notes (6 entries × 100 chars), lean TOOL_BLOCKS by 60%, lazy-load toolsBlock

estimatedImpact: Cuts 25-55K mystery tokens per turn. Estimated 50% reduction in context overhead, preserving full functionality.
executorPrompt:
You are executing a proposal to reduce context token usage by 50%. Apply the exact edits from the proposal to src/gateway/prompt-context.ts:

1. Line 15: Change processIntradayNotes(raw, maxEntries = 12, maxCharsPerEntry = 250) to (raw, maxEntries = 6, maxCharsPerEntry = 100)

2. Lines 270–332 (TOOL_BLOCKS): Replace the browser, agents, teams, and schedule blocks with the lean checklist versions in the proposal. Keep desktop, files, task, shell, memory, integrations, debug, skills, agent_builder unchanged — they are already lean.

3. Lines 364–385 (buildToolsContext function): Replace the entire function with the NEW version in the proposal that lazy-loads CATEGORY_POLICIES only when activatedCategories.size > 0.

After applying all edits, run: npm run build

If build succeeds, report: "Proposal applied. Ready for restart." If build fails, report the error and stop.

Do NOT restart the gateway — the user will call gateway_restart when ready.
